title: Validate real multi-cycle optimizer runs for Medication Review Prescriber and Dosage

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting real multi-cycle validation only. Launching fresh Prescriber and Dosage optimizer runs with days=180, max_samples=100, max_iterations=20, then verifying task metadata and monitoring direct CLI logs until cycle 2 or a concrete failure.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Launched fresh real runs and verified task metadata immediately. Prescriber procedure=695a6bcd-f17c-4d04-ae68-358a5e2cfe0b task=d994b07c-a8cd-4a9e-a3b9-efd7c0f41b81 with run_parameters.max_iterations=20. Dosage procedure=aa6aa920-20d5-4586-a6d5-89e9259f2b31 task=9ddecc2d-c06c-409a-a752-a4c30ac9e04f with run_parameters.max_iterations=20. Monitoring direct CLI logs until cycle 2 or a concrete failure.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Validated first real cycle entry on both runs from direct CLI logs. Prescriber log shows ENTERING CYCLE 1/20 at line 10825. Dosage log shows ENTERING CYCLE 1/20 at line 12132. Continuing to monitor until direct log evidence of cycle 2 or a concrete failure.
